title: senecio krauseanus
intro: Senecio krauseanus, also known as Krause's ragwort, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the daisy family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat liver and digestive issues. The health benefits of Senecio krauseanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support immune system health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the leaves and roots being used to make herbal teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
